privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified data for the three isomers: 1) 1,2-Dichlorobenzene: CAS 95-50-1, Melting Point approx -17°C, Physical State at 20°C is LIQUID. 2) 1,3-Dichlorobenzene: CAS 541-73-1, Melting Point approx -24.8°C (acceptable range -25 to -22°C), Physical State at 20°C is LIQUID. 3) 1,4-Dichlorobenzene: CAS 106-46-7, Melting Point approx 53°C (acceptable range 52-54°C), Physical State at 20°C is SOLID. The target output file must be located at /home/ga/Documents/isomer_analysis.txt.
